subject: JE pick up in S76
body:
Can you ask Jeffrey if he would like to be picked up in the  Sikorsky, EAST 
side heliport and bring him to Teterboro for our  departure today....Noon pick 
up at EAST side heliport....since our wheels  up time is 12:30pm
please confirm,.
Larry
